THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION FILED. PER THE NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY DEFENDANT, THE COURT EXPRESSES NO VIEW AS TO WHO THE ARBITRATOR IS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christine McPhee, Esq., of Luscutoff, Lendormy & Assoc., Tel. 415.989.7500, appearing for the plaintiff and moving party.

No other Appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BAY AREA LINEN & VALET SERVICE CENTER, INC.'S Motion To Stay Arbitration is Granted. This action is stayed pending the conclusion of arbitration proceedings. No substantive opposition filed. Per the notice of non-opposition filed by defendant, the court expresses no view as to who the arbitrator is. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
